description: 暖色杂志风 - 栗色 + 米白 + 宋体,温厚的长文阅读感,适合家庭情感 / 生活随笔

styles.body: font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', 'Songti SC', 'PingFang SC', serif; font-size: 15.5px; color: #3a2e26; line-height: 1.9; letter-spacing: 0.5px; padding: 20px 22px; background: #fbf7f0;
styles.h2: font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #5a2f1a; margin: 38px 0 20px; padding: 4px 0 10px 0; border-bottom: 2px solid #c9a27d; line-height: 1.5;
styles.p: margin: 18px 0; text-indent: 0; text-align: justify; color: #3a2e26; line-height: 1.95;
styles.blockquote: margin: 26px 0; padding: 20px 24px; background: #f4ead8; border-left: 4px solid #c9a27d; color: #5a4636; font-size: 14.5px; border-radius: 0 6px 6px 0; line-height: 1.9; font-style: italic;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 4px; margin: 26px auto; display: block; box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(90,47,26,0.08);
styles.hr: border: none; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, #c9a27d, transparent); margin: 40px 0;
styles.section_divider: text-align: center; color: #c9a27d; letter-spacing: 12px; font-size: 14px; margin: 36px 0; user-select: none;
